name: Pipeline Coverage
description: Coverage ratio across the org, segments, and individual owners, under one governed definition that doesn't change between leadership asks. The single number every executive conversation starts with.
alsoSurfaces: What's our coverage right now, against quota?
Which segments and owners are below target?
How has coverage trended over the past 12 weeks?
Where in the funnel is the open pipeline concentrated?
beforeWeRun: Time horizon: current quarter, or rolling 90 days?
Coverage target: 3.0x default, or tenant-configured override?
Granularity: org-wide only, or include segment + owner breakdown?

whatYoullGet.name: Headline coverage
whatYoullGet.desc: Big-number KPI with target indicator and health-band coloring (green/amber/red).

whatYoullGet.name: Open pipeline summary
whatYoullGet.desc: Total value, count, weighted value against quota: KPI tile grid.

whatYoullGet.name: Coverage trend
whatYoullGet.desc: Coverage ratio over trailing 12 weeks with target-line overlay.

whatYoullGet.name: Coverage by segment
whatYoullGet.desc: Horizontal bar chart with health-band coloring per segment.

whatYoullGet.name: Coverage by owner
whatYoullGet.desc: Sortable table: owner, open pipeline, quota, coverage, health.

whatYoullGet.name: Stage breakdown
whatYoullGet.desc: Funnel or stacked bar showing where the open pipeline value sits.

callout: 4 quick inputs, then Sage builds your coverage dashboard in ~10 min.
